name: Pure Swing Golf
about: Pure Swing Golf is a state-of-the-art indoor training facility in Dallas, Texas, founded by professional golfer Anthony Broussard. The facility provides a climate-controlled environment where golfers can use top-of-the-line technology to play, practice, and learn, regardless of weather conditions. The coaching approach is centered on long-term player development, utilizing advanced measurement tools to create personalized game plans for individuals with varying skill levels and goals.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to professional-grade technology including Foresight GC Quad launch monitor and Swing Catalyst pressure plates
Coaching from professionals with competitive experience, including a founder who played in a major championship
A personalized, data-driven approach focused on long-term skill development and measurable results

simulator_hardware.notes: High-speed camera launch monitor providing detailed data on club path, face angle, ball speed, and more

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you will need to bring your own clubs to practice at Pure Swing Golf.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: There is no mention of food or drink service at Pure Swing Golf, suggesting BYOB may be allowed but is not explicitly confirmed.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify the time required to play a full 18 holes on a simulator.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Pure Swing Golf offers junior lessons with customized game plans and a supportive environment for young golfers.
